consent.text: By continuing to use the BrainOS service, you confirm your consent to the processing of personal data that you provide directly or indirectly when using the service. Data processing is carried out in accordance with the purposes and procedure described in the Privacy Policy. You also confirm agreement with the terms of the Public Offer. In case of disagreement with these terms, you must stop using the service. Contact: mr.sayfullaev@gmail.com
consent.declined_message: You have declined to use the service. All data has been deleted. If you change your mind — write /start.
consent.blocked_message: You previously declined to use the service. To register again, write /start.

onboarding.welcome_short:
Hello! I'm your AI assistant.

Let's set up communication!
onboarding.ask_tone: How should I communicate with you?
onboarding.ask_length: What kind of responses do you prefer?
onboarding.ask_custom:
Want to add your own instructions?

Write how I should communicate with you, or press "Done"
onboarding.completed:
Great! Everything is set up.

Now just write me anything, and I'll respond!
onboarding.welcome_back: Welcome back, {{name}}! Happy to see you again! How can I help you today?

help.message:
Hi! I am the BrainOS AI assistant. I use multiple models (GPT-4, GigaChat, etc.) and return the fastest answer.

Available modules:
• Tasks, Reminders, Wallet
• Notes, Sleep, Water, Food, Health, Workout
• Subscriptions, Debts, Savings, Contacts, News, Ideas
• Trips, Places, Buy, Quotes, Knowledge Base (kb)
• Habits, Investments, Courses, Email, Projects, Car, Pets

Just type what you need — the bot will route to the right module.

/settings — profile settings
/help — this help
help.message_pro:
Hi! I am the BrainOS AI assistant. I use multiple models (GPT-4, GigaChat, etc.) and return the fastest answer.

Available modules (Pro/Team):
• Tasks, Reminders, Wallet, Notes, Sleep, Water, Food, Health, Workout
• Subscriptions, Debts, Savings, Contacts, News, Ideas
• Trips, Places, Buy, Quotes, Knowledge Base (kb)

Just type what you need — the bot will route to the right module. Unlimited AI.

/settings — profile settings

help.message_free:
Hi! I am the BrainOS AI assistant. I use multiple models (GPT-4, GigaChat, etc.) and return the fastest answer.

Your modules (Free):
• {{modules}}

Just type what you need — the bot will route to the right module. AI limit: 100 requests/month.

/settings — settings, plan
/help — this help

settings.title: Your profile:
settings.name: Name: {{name}}
settings.edit_prompt: Want to change settings? Press the button below.
settings.edit_menu_title: What would you like to change?
settings.delete_warning:
WARNING!

Are you sure you want to delete your account?

• All your data will be permanently deleted
• Bot messages will be deleted
• Settings will be reset

This action cannot be undone!
settings.account_deleted: Your account has been successfully deleted.
settings.instruction_step1: Tap on the bot name at the top
settings.export_sent: Your data has been exported and sent as a file.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.no_response: Failed to get AI response. Please try again.
errors.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
